zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde Beaumont於1114年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Robert Beaumont68歲，母親Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois33歲。她與William Lovel d'Ivry結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1189年在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde Beaumont于1114年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Robert Beaumont68岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois33岁。她与William Lovel d'Ivry结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1189年在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde Beaumont was born in 1114, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Beaumont, was 68 and her mother, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, was 33. She married William Lovel d'Ivry. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1189, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde Beaumont est née en 1114, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Beaumont, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Lovel d'Ivry. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1189, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde Beaumont 1114 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Beaumont 68 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois 33. Sie hat William Lovel d'Ivry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1189 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Beaumont è nata il nel 1114 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Beaumont, aveva 68 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Lovel d'Ivry. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1189, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde Beaumont(이)가 1114년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Beaumont(은)는 68세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William Lovel d'Ivry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1189년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Beaumont nasceu em 1114, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Beaumont, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tinha 33 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde Beaumont родилась в 1114 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Beaumont было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Lovel d'Ivry. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1189 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde Beaumont nació en 1114, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Beaumont, tenía 68 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Lovel d'Ivry. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1189, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
